name: Verify test suite post force-push
description: Run npm run test:all. Confirm 682 tests pass. If any fail, diagnose whether force-push caused regression.
acceptance: All 682 tests pass. No new test failures.

name: ClinicalSwipe billing engine integration
description: Integrate claim_lock, claim_release, claim_status tools from clinicalswipe-mcp into CareOS. Requires review_metrics enforcement on attestation.
acceptance: claim_lock acquires lock, claim_release validates OIG thresholds (30s/20s/80%), claim_status returns pipeline state.

name: VBC pre-visit intake tool
description: Deploy vbc_previsit_intake to scan referrals for PIN, ACP, PCM, CCM, SDOH, and PROMIS opportunities.
acceptance: Tool identifies all billable codes from a test referral. Decision ledger entries written with correct authorization levels.

name: Stedi EDI 837P submission pipeline
description: Wire payload-builder.ts to Stedi API. Job 4 (billing drain) picks up ready_for_submission claims and submits.
acceptance: Test claim submitted to Stedi sandbox. Response contains transaction_id and control_number.

name: Election addendum tools (hospice)
acceptance: Addendum generated with content hash, delivery captured with timing compliance check, HQRP report shows compliance rate.

name: SSVI analytics module
description: Deploy get_ssvi_score, get_ssvi_network_scan, get_ssvi_market_intelligence. Ingest CMS SSVI CSV data.
acceptance: Score returned for test CCN. Network scan returns ranked list. Market intelligence shows score distribution.

name: Conversational attention residual memory
description: Deploy conversation_sessions and conversation_blocks tables with pgvector HNSW indexes. Wire retrieveConversationContext into careos-agent.ts.
acceptance: Sage conversation creates session record with embedding. Monthly compression produces block summary. Retrieval returns attention-weighted context.

name: WorkOS MCP Auth integration
description: Integrate WorkOS AuthKit OAuth 2.1 for ClinicalSwipe MCP tool role-gating. attest_claim visible only to medical_director role.
acceptance: Josh authenticates via AuthKit. Session-scoped token. Tool visibility matches role. Session expires on timeout.
